scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:next-cache
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.clean:project: npm run clean:next && npm run docker:prune
scripts.docker:prune: docker image prune -f && docker builder prune -f --filter until=24h --keep-storage 1GB
scripts.docker:infra: docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans db tailscale db-tailscale-proxy libreoffice symmetricds
scripts.docker:up: npm run build:frontend:docker && docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:renderer: docker compose -f docker-compose.libreoffice.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans && npm run docker:prune
